name: WiPE-FaLl
summary: Wireless CSI amplitude dataset for estimating low, medium, and high fall likelihood from simulated timed up-and-go tests.

hardware.platform: Two USRP X300 software-defined radios with VERT2450 antennas

settings.scenario: Timed up-and-go trials under three simulated balance-risk conditions

standardization.notes: Keep fall-risk estimation distinct from binary fall-event detection and preserve trial/subject identifiers when available.
